hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.nix) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; case "$f" in "$root"/nix/*) git -C "$root" add --intent-to-add "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
